IGUI_PD_BreedDesc_rottweiler: A powerful guard dog bred for protection work, a true warrior on par with the German Shepherd: it learns Combat twice as fast, hits hard at high skill, knocks zombies down and keeps fighting where most breeds panic. Fighting beside it steels you too: while your Rottweiler is engaged in combat nearby, your melee swings drain less endurance (Front Line). Found guarding warehouses, factories and junkyards, with a rare chance in homes.
IGUI_PD_Moodle_FrontLine_desc: Your Rottweiler is fighting at your side. While it is engaged in combat close to you, fed and loyal, your melee swings drain less endurance.
